# Domain & Business Logic

## plan_generation_timeout_ms extended to 1800 seconds for large handoff prompts

[Trigger]: When plan generation invokes Claude CLI via callClaude to synthesize implementation plans from daily review context. [Detail]: The plan_generation_timeout_ms config was increased from 120 seconds to 1800 seconds (30 minutes). Large handoff prompts that include daily review context (500+ KB of work history, knowledge entries, and project configurations) can require significant processing time with Opus. The previous 120-second timeout was insufficient for mature projects with accumulated event history and knowledge bases. [Consequence]: Plan generation now waits up to 30 minutes for Opus to complete analysis instead of timing out early, allowing comprehensive implementation plans to be generated even for complex contexts.

_Source: `config.json`_

_Tags: `config`, `performance`_
